title: Protocol from MBB growth
author: Hýsek, Štěpán
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The protocol contains raw data as well as methods. Physical and mechanical properties of different variants of mycelium-based biocomposites are characterised.
steps_raw: The protocol contains raw data as well as methods. Physical and mechanical properties of different variants of mycelium-based biocomposites are characterised.
